definitions: Runs in the background — handles events and logic that doesn't need the webpage to be open
Runs on webpages — can read and modify the DOM of any page the extension has access to
The config file for a browser extension — defines its name, permissions, scripts, and everything the browser needs to know about it
What the extension is allowed to access — declared in the manifest
The small window that appears when you click the extension icon in the browser toolbar
